id.description: Unique URL-friendly slug/identifier for the project

title.description: Full title of the research project

summary.description: Brief one-to-two sentence summary for preview cards

detailedDescription.description: In-depth description of the project goals and results

tags.description: List of thematic keywords (e.g. Synthesis, Thin Films)

image.description: Path to research graphic or image

funding.description: Sponsor or agency details supporting the research
